text:
Very disappointing experience. While the petrol pump area looks clean, the washroom condition is horrible and completely misleading.

Tap water is flowing like a fountain, the washroom is flooded with dirty water, the flush tank is not working and left open, and the light has fallen and is hanging, creating a serious safety risk. A dirty water bucket is kept inside.

This washroom is unhygienic, unsafe, and unfit for public use. Such negligence at an Indian Oil petrol pump in Andheri East is unacceptable. Immediate action required.

It is a newly opened petrol pump which lacks professionalism and organisation. Most of the time, we are unable to understand as to where we should go for petrol and where for diesel. Staff is quite lethargic and lacks professionalism.

Contrary to the above, the tyre pressure section is quite quick and fast in attending the vehicles. The person there even repaired the puncture within minutes while we remained seated in the car.

Fraud alert.
Be carefully while filling.ask for bill and match the amount as they are notorious to scam. 3 times I had similar experience. Once your fuel is filled one person will come to distract by asking to open car bonnet or wiper cleaning and meantime immediately the station attendant resets the pump so that we do not see the actual amount. Ask for bill dont pay without checking the bill amount.

Yesterday filled petrol in Toyota Urban Cruiser asked the assistant to do full tank, total fuel filled did shock me, he managed  filled 43.2L in the tank having capacity of 45L. Note the car wasn't running in reserve, on top of it the digital indicator wasn't showing full filled.
Scam, be careful. Another guy suddenly distracted me by tapping on the bonnet to open it,  despite me telling NO, he insisted to open.

Staff's Behaviour is very polite to everyone and service is pretty good .

These people work very well on the air at the petrol pump and talk to the costumer in a good way and their service is also very good

On the JVLR CoCo pump, you can be sure of no pilferage. However, the washrooms are closed, so you’ll need to convince them for the keys, which is our right.

Nice service fast employee behaviour professional umesh dwivedi excellent
Nice service fast employee behaviour professional umesh dwivedi excellent

Guys please be careful while filling petrol on this pump. They try to scam you in the name of free service and rig the meter.

Note - Driver/Owner should always pay attention to meter and not get distracted by what those people are saying. They will say meter is stuck and restart again. Don’t let them do that and just away with whatever petrol you have filled.

I have raise a formal complaint against this petrol pump.

I'm  coming here for almost 5 months . Employees are very generous .
